## Aegis - Pull Request

### Description
<!-- Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. -->
<!-- Explain how these changes fit into the security-first architecture of Aegis. -->

### Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security Enhancement

### Security Checklist
<!-- all PRs must pass the following checks: -->
- [ ] I have verified that no sensitive keys or secrets (e.g., Circle API keys, Testnet keys) are hardcoded in the code.
- [ ] My code follows the Aegis security guidelines and best practices.
- [ ] The changes have been tested against the Arc Testnet (if applicable).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (if applicable).
- [ ] My code passes all existing tests.

### Related Issue
<!-- Link to the issue here: e.g. Fixes #123 -->

### Additional Notes
<!-- Any other relevant information, such as deployment steps or manual testing done. -->
